case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. HENRY MARTIN III ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 SUTTER STREET, UNIT #225 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY.SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70019411)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70019411) AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY
DECLARATION RE. AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 70019411) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69992075), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAY-02-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 69992075) AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70077491)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69992075), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAY-02-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN III, HENRY DOES 1 TO 5
